/usr/bin/arm-linux-gnueabihf-g++-13 -static CMakeFiles/modbus_9001.dir/app/device_init.cpp.o CMakeFiles/modbus_9001.dir/app/message_transmitter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/modbus_9001.dir/app/regist_manage.cpp.o CMakeFiles/modbus_9001.dir/core/communication_factory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/modbus_9001.dir/hal/bluetooth.cpp.o CMakeFiles/modbus_9001.dir/hal/de_cell4g.cpp.o CMakeFiles/modbus_9001.dir/hal/esp8266.cpp.o CMakeFiles/modbus_9001.dir/hal/gps.cpp.o CMakeFiles/modbus_9001.dir/hal/lora.cpp.o CMakeFiles/modbus_9001.dir/hal/usbctl.cpp.o CMakeFiles/modbus_9001.dir/infra/communica_manage.cpp.o CMakeFiles/modbus_9001.dir/infra/get.cpp.o CMakeFiles/modbus_9001.dir/infra/software_wdt.cpp.o CMakeFiles/modbus_9001.dir/modbus_9001.cpp.o CMakeFiles/modbus_9001.dir/protocol/hj212.cpp.o CMakeFiles/modbus_9001.dir/protocol/protocol_process.cpp.o CMakeFiles/modbus_9001.dir/sensor/sensor_driver.cpp.o CMakeFiles/modbus_9001.dir/sensor/usart.cpp.o -o modbus_9001   -L/home/zcl/ship/SAP_9001_V2.1/libmodbus/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/home/zcl/ship/SAP_9001_V2.1/libmodbus/lib /home/zcl/ship/SAP_9001_V2.1/libmodbus/lib/libmodbus.a -lpthread -lm
